summary: Static verification of GitHub Actions workflow rewrite for build-android-apk.yml (clean-build + verbose diagnostics + escape-hatch artifact). All 11 review-request claims verified. Backend regression: 221 passed, 2 skipped — no regression vs iter27 baseline.

workflow_verification.wipe_caches_step: PASS — step 8 'Wipe caches for a truly clean build' removes frontend/node_modules, frontend/dist, frontend/android/app/build, frontend/android/build, frontend/android/.gradle, ~/.gradle/caches, ~/.gradle/daemon, ~/.cache/yarn. Gated by `if: ${{ github.event.inputs.clean_cache != 'false' }}` (default 'true')
workflow_verification.gradle_flags: PASS — 'Assemble APK' step (16) invokes `./gradlew clean :app:$TASK` with ALL required flags: --no-daemon, --no-build-cache, --refresh-dependencies, --info, --stacktrace, --warning-mode=all (verified via grep at lines 171-176)
workflow_verification.failure_diagnostics_step: PASS — step 17 'Diagnose Gradle log on failure' has `if: failure()`, greps for `FAILURE:|FAILED|ERROR|Exception|error:|>`, and uses awk to extract 'What went wrong:' section (line 201)
workflow_verification.log_artifact_always: PASS — step 18 'Upload Gradle log artifact' has `if: always()`, uploads build-logs/ as artifact `gradle-build-log-${{ github.run_number }}` (14-day retention)
workflow_verification.workflow_dispatch_inputs: PASS — exposes `build_type` (choice: debug|release, default debug) AND `clean_cache` (choice: true|false, default true)
workflow_verification.success_gated_apk_steps: PASS — 'Locate produced APK' (19) and 'Upload APK artifact' (20) both use `if: success()`
workflow_verification.job_summary: PASS — step 21 'Job summary' has `if: always()`, writes to $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY with distinct success vs failure messages including artifact download instructions
workflow_verification.setup_node_regression_check: PASS — setup-node@v4 step has only `node-version: '20'`; NO `cache:` or `cache-dependency-path:` directives (iter27 bug not reintroduced). The one `cache:` grep match is `clean_cache:` workflow input at line 15, unrelated.
workflow_verification.single_file_change: PASS — only /app/.github/workflows/build-android-apk.yml modified; no other repo files touched
workflow_verification.backend_regression: PASS — 221 passed, 2 skipped (matches iter27 baseline exactly)

escape_hatch_verification: CONFIRMED — even on failed build, the user WILL get: (a) inline auto-extracted diagnostics in the 'Diagnose Gradle log on failure' step output, (b) downloadable full log artifact 'gradle-build-log-<run_number>' via `if: always()`, (c) a job summary panel pointing at both. This is the promised escape hatch.
critical_code_review_comments: Workflow is well-structured with clear section banners; failure-mode diagnostics are actionable (tail 100 + grep patterns + awk 'What went wrong' extraction).
The `Locate produced APK` step has `if: success()` which is redundant since GitHub Actions defaults steps to success-only, but harmless and improves readability.
`clean_cache` is declared as `type: choice` with string values 'true'/'false' — the comparison `!= 'false'` correctly treats push events (empty input) as clean-build. Good defensive default.
`pipefail` is set inside the assemble step so `tee` cannot mask a gradle non-zero exit. Correct.
Backend health preflight fails fast with clear ::error:: annotation if VITE_BACKEND_URL secret missing / unreachable — prevents baking a broken URL into APK.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter28 verified the workflow-file rewrite (clean build + verbose gradle + always-uploaded log artifact escape hatch). Backend baseline remains 221 passing. Cannot execute the workflow in this container (no JDK/Android SDK) — next validation happens when user re-runs the GitHub Action. If it still fails, user will now have a downloadable log artifact + inline diagnostics to paste back.
